subcodes.first_line: O 'Abdu'l-Ḥusayn! Thy letter hath come before the snow-white Spot, in the presence of Him Who is the Lord of all names, and the glance of His loving-kindness is directed towards it [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا عبد الحسین کتابت در بقعه بیضا امام عین مالک اسما حاضر و لحاظ عنایت باو
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @proofs of the Manifestations of God, @love of God, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity
